auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in with your organization account to access the GSAD (GPU Server Access Dashboard) console.
auth.loginHint: Accounts are provisioned by administrators. Contact an admin if you need access.
auth.changePasswordSubtitle: Update your GSAD login password. This does not change server SSH passwords.
auth.changePasswordPageSubtitle: Update your GSAD console login password

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least {min} characters
validation.passwordMaxLength: Password must be at most {max} characters
validation.newPasswordMinLength: New password must be at least {min} characters
validation.newPasswordMaxLength: New password must be at most {max} characters
validation.newPasswordSameAsCurrent: New password must differ from the current password

board.title: GPU resource load
board.description: Browse nodes by resource level and online status before requesting access. Data refreshes every {seconds} seconds.
board.emptyHint: Confirm that nodes are reporting to the backend, or refresh the list later.
board.noNodesFiltered: No nodes match the current filters. Adjust filters or
board.serverListLoadFailed: Failed to load server list: {message}. You can fill other fields and refresh the page to retry.

application.newDescription: Select a target server and submit. After access is granted, you can revoke it anytime from My requests.
application.noServersAvailable: No servers available (confirm the board has reporting data)
application.sshPasswordHint: If provided, this password is used for SSH login on the provisioned account. Otherwise an initial password is generated after grant completes.
application.installMinicondaHint: When checked, Miniconda is installed to ~/miniconda3 during provisioning. Otherwise only the install script is copied to ~/shell_utils.
application.myDescription: View grant and resource status. Refreshes every {seconds} seconds.
application.noApplicationsFiltered: No requests match the current filters
application.revokingHint: Waiting for the server to revoke the account…
application.connectionHint: Keep the initial password safe and change it after first login.
application.noFailureDetail: No details available. Retry later or contact operations.
application.cancelHint: Stops provisioning only; no account has been created on the server yet.
application.revokeHint: Revoking deletes your Linux account and all data on that server. This cannot be undone.
application.confirmCancel: Cancel this request? Provisioning will stop and no account has been created on the server yet.
application.confirmRevoke: Revoke access? This deletes your Linux account and all data on that server and cannot be undone.

admin.userManagementDesc: View, edit, disable, or delete GSAD accounts.
admin.userImportDesc: Upload a CSV to create GSAD accounts in bulk. Required columns: email, linux_username, initial_password (at least 8 characters). Distribute initial passwords through a secure channel.
admin.serverImportDesc: Upload a CSV to register GPU servers. Required column: {serverId}. Optional: {sshHost}, {resourceLevel}. The {agentPsk} column is ignored (can share files with PSK batch script output).
admin.importResultWithErrors: Import complete: {created} created, {skipped} skipped, {errors} row errors
admin.deleteWarning: This cannot be undone. Related request records will also be deleted.
admin.revokeSshOnDelete: Also revoke and delete SSH/GPU accounts on servers
admin.noUsersFiltered: No users match the current filters
admin.usersDeletedPending: Deleted {deleted}; {pending} SSH revokes still pending, retry delete later
admin.deleteWarningWithRevoke: Selected users have {count} active/revoking GPU accesses. Checking this will start server account revocation.
admin.deleteWarningNoRevoke: Selected users have {count} active GPU accesses. Server SSH accounts are kept if unchecked.
admin.name: Name
admin.adminCannotDisable: Admin accounts cannot be disabled or deleted
admin.revokePendingRetry: Revoke started ({count} pending), retry delete later
admin.userDeleteWarningWithRevoke: This user has {count} active/revoking GPU accesses. Checking this will start server account revocation.
admin.userDeleteWarningNoRevoke: This user has {count} active GPU accesses. Server SSH accounts are kept if unchecked.

errors.UNAUTHORIZED: Session expired, please sign in again
errors.STATE_CONFLICT: State changed, refresh and try again
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests, try again later
errors.INTERNAL_ERROR: Internal server error, try again later
errors.networkError: Network error, check your connection and retry
